description: Metadata-only complex zoom example for a seed-driven workflow. It records the request, seed provenance, and structural gaps, but it does not change the optimization strategy.

structural_gaps.seed: nearby zoom seed with similar family but different span
structural_gaps.note: Record the span mismatch before any adaptation.
Record the aperture mismatch as part of the input metadata.
Log the structural delta without changing the optimization flow.
Track the packaging gap for later traceability.

selection_notes: Example input metadata only; it is not a directive to change the staged optimization flow.
Structural gaps should be tracked in the design log before optimization starts.

zoom_configurations.name: wide
zoom_configurations.notes: Metadata target for the wide end of the zoom range.

zoom_configurations.name: mid
zoom_configurations.notes: Metadata target for the nominal mid-zoom position.

zoom_configurations.name: tele
zoom_configurations.notes: Metadata target for the tele end of the zoom range.

assumptions: This example is input metadata only and does not alter optimization behavior.
The seed is recorded for traceability; any adaptation burden must still be handled by the normal staged design loop.
Zoom configurations are target metadata, not a solver policy.
